newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q2 beat and raised FY guidance ($8.00-8.25 adj EPS) was May 7, and the $2.35B Megger acquisition was announced April 15 (closes early FY27) - both predate the window. Only routine analyst reaffirmations (Buy, ~$350 PT) since.

sources.label: ESCO Technologies near fair value after Megger (Simply Wall St)
ESCO Q2 2026 earnings beat and raised guidance (Chartmill)

verdicts.rankRationale: Nothing new since June 9 on the sensors/measurement latent-node lens; Q2 beat (May 7) and Megger deal (Apr 15) already in the price and prior case. +13.8% move is re-rating, not fresh evidence. Megger tilts mix toward utility/A&D test - supportive but already known. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Megger ($590M rev, $60M synergies) pushes ~85% of pro-forma rev to high-growth utility/A&D; strong Q2 organic +12.8%, FY EPS raised to $8.00-8.25.
verdicts.neutral: Megger doesn't close until early FY27; valuation at fair value after +75% YTD; test/shielding link to compute is adjacent not central.
verdicts.bear: Equity-funded $2.35B deal dilutes; integration/regulatory risk; rich multiple leaves little margin for a miss.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Megger closing and accretion confirmation; A&D production recovery
